changelog: - Added automatic **PC Offline Status** update before remote shutdown.
- Added Firebase notification when a PC is remotely shut down.
- Added improved cloud status synchronization between client and Firebase.
- Added biometric login suggestion after successful license activation in Owner App.
- Added Premium Login Screen preparation for Owner App.
- Added Release Manager support for creating updater packages.
- Improved remote shutdown workflow to ensure status is uploaded before Windows shutdown.
- Improved notification handling structure for future push notification support.
- Improved installer preparation for cloud notification integration.
- Optimized updater verification process before package creation.
- Cleaner background threading during shutdown operations.
- Fixed missing OFFLINE status when shutting down remotely.
- Fixed Firebase command status occasionally remaining in "running".
- Fixed background thread execution during shutdown.
- Fixed several Firebase synchronization edge cases.
- Better synchronization before shutdown to reduce inconsistent cloud status.
- Improved reliability of remote command execution.
Thank you for using **ObeeTech Timer & Updater**.

news.title: ObeeUpdater New Release
news.message: This update improves the launcher and updater system.
